utility_evaluation.REASONING:

- travel_dates: Provided (specific dates) — fully specified but only 4 nights which implies 5 days? User asked 5-day; still dates are specific.
- transportation: Format asks for flight details with costs. Provided type (Flights), details (airline class and party), and cost (800). Lacks exact flight times/numbers but still qualifies as flight details with costs — accept.
- accommodation: Format asks hotel selection with costs. Provided name (Tranquil Inn), details (4 nights, 2 rooms), and cost (800) — fully specified.
- activities: Selected activities with costs. Provided two activities with details and costs — fully specified.
- additional_services: Any extra services with costs. Provided null — item is present but not an inclusion; however, the item exists and is specified as none. This counts as included since it answers the field.
- total_budget: Complete cost breakdown. Provided total_cost and currency; lacks itemized breakdown beyond totals, but combined with costs in other sections, the total is present. Considered sufficiently specified as a complete cost figure.
All 7 items are present and sufficiently specified per the given format.
